name: MR
description: Library component. Merge request lifecycle. Driven by two mechanisms: observe (Polecat state triggers Absent->Ready) and channel (Refinery sends Processing and Merged events). MR can only reach Merged when the Refinery explicitly merges it -- not spontaneously. This is the load-bearing property: NormalLandMeansWorkIntegrated is honest because MR advancement requires Refinery action.

POLECAT_OBSERVE.description: observes polecat state. Absent -> Ready when polecat = Done.

REFINERY_IN.description: receives Processing and Merged events from the Refinery. Tagged 'Processing' and 'Merged'.

actors.name: MR
actors.owner: Merge request phase lifecycle. Absent until polecat completes. Ready = in merge queue. Processing = refinery claimed it. Merged = refinery completed the merge.

triples.event: polecat done: MR enters merge queue
refinery claims this MR for processing
